mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 0.39% signals an extended monetary easing regime. Sustained low policy rates compress long-term discount rates and reduce term premium, causing 10-year Treasury yields to decline over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate into duration.
regime_hint: monetary easing cycle with policy rates near zero
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 55% of 20-day forward windows when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.50%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales at 355,655 million dollars combined with housing starts at 791 thousand units indicate sustained consumer demand. Strong demand signals future inflation expectations, causing 10-year Treasury yields to rise as markets price in higher long-term inflation risk over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields decline in more than 50% of 20-day windows when both RSAFS and HOUST are above their 12-month medians, or joint signal Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 6.7% combined with payroll employment at 136,167 thousand persons indicates labor market slack. Persistent slack suppresses wage growth expectations and inflation, causing 10-year Treasury yields to fall as real rate expectations decline over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE remains above 6.0% for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields rise in more than 55% of 60-day windows when UNRATE > 6.0% and PAYEMS growth is negative, or interaction Rank IC < 0.06 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 106.1173 (index 2017=100) signals supply-side capacity utilization. Rising industrial production without corresponding demand growth indicates supply constraints that compress margins and raise inflation expectations, pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields decline in more than 50% of 20-day windows following INDPRO increases > 0.5%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI at 216.71 (index 1982-1984=100) combined with federal funds rate at 0.39% creates a deeply negative real policy rate. This regime triggers expectations of future monetary tightening to combat inflation, causing 10-year Treasury yields to rise as markets price in higher future policy rates over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields decline in more than 55% of 5-day windows when real rates are negative and CPI accelerates, or interaction Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP at 11,712.3 billion chained 2017 dollars (quarterly) combined with declining housing starts at 791 thousand units signals demand deceleration. Slowing demand reduces inflation expectations and long-term growth forecasts, causing 10-year Treasury yields to fall over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields rise in more than 50% of 60-day windows following HOUST declines > 5%, or Rank IC < 0.06 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment at 136,167 thousand persons shows labor market tightness. Tight labor markets drive wage inflation expectations, which feed into long-term inflation expectations, causing 10-year Treasury yields to rise over the next 20 trading days as markets reprice inflation risk.
regime_hint: tight labor market with wage pressure
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields decline in more than 55% of 20-day windows following PAYEMS gains > 200 thousand, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production at 106.1173 combined with unemployment at 6.7% indicates supply-side constraints with labor slack. This mismatch signals structural supply bottlenecks that persist despite available labor, raising inflation expectations and pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yields decline in more than 50% of 60-day windows when INDPRO > 106.0 and UNRATE > 6.0%, or interaction Rank IC < 0.06 over any 3-year rolling window.
